lanes.name: resource-economy
lanes.prompt: Build a ResourceAwareDispatcher that tracks token/quota usage across providers (Claude, Codex, Grok, Cerebras, big-AGI). Score and recommend the most economical viable provider before delegating autonomous work. Add Supabase table for quotas, Go package, integrate into handoff generator and autonomous loop. Use full Explore-Research-Plan-Implement-Verify-Test-Commit, checkpoint PROGRESS.

autonomous.research: Survey provider pricing, current vibe usage patterns, quota APIs if available.
